BME

# Biomedical Engineering

Established 2015

[Faculty](/departments/bme/faculty)[Apply Now](/admissions)

## Vision & Mission

### Vision

To be a leading center for biomedical engineering education and innovation in healthcare technology.

### Mission

* Provide quality education in biomedical engineering and medical devices
* Foster research in medical imaging, biomaterials, and prosthetics
* Develop engineers committed to improving healthcare delivery
* Build collaborations with hospitals and medical device companies

## Programs Offered

### B.E. Biomedical Engineering

Duration: 4 yearsIntake: 60

## Labs & Facilities

### Laboratories

* Medical Electronics Lab
* Biomaterials Lab
* Medical Imaging Lab
* Biosignal Processing Lab
* Rehabilitation Engineering Lab
* Clinical Engineering Lab
